message:
test(masked): extend masked metamorphic relations with boundary cases

Added 10 fixtures across 5 masked metamorphic relations that each
had a single case, broadening input diversity:

- masked_compress_idempotent: all-unmasked (compress == identity)
  and fully-masked (compress == empty)
- masked_add_commutative: 2D disjoint masks with different mask
  patterns; all-masked + all-unmasked one-sided interaction
- masked_mul_one_identity: 2D checkerboard mask; nomask with
  extreme magnitudes (1e-10, ±1e10) to stress fp stability
- masked_count_complement: mostly-masked 1D and alternating 2D
- masked_filled_unmasked_unchanged: no-mask (fill has no effect)
  and 2D sparse-mask with zero fill

27 masked_metamorphic cases total (from 17).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
